purpose: Local CI-green predictor for the autonomous PR lane. Mirrors the locally-runnable subset of main's required status checks (validate.yml).
predicts: 6 of the 7 required checks (the pure Node ones).
does_not_cover: API smoke (demo HA) [e2e.yml demo-api-smoke] - dockerized + ghcr image pull; INTENTIONALLY required (deliberately promoted), CI-confirmed only.
HACS Validation [validate.yml hacs] - GitHub-Action-only (hacs/action); NOT a required check, does not gate merges.

gates.note: CI runs this without npm ci (dependency-free script); npm_ci not required.
CI runs this without npm ci (dependency-free script); npm_ci not required.

gates.command: npm run build && bash -c 'set -e; fail=0; check(){ f=$(ls dist/$1 2>/dev/null|head -1); if [ -z "$f" ]; then echo "  MISSING: $1"; fail=1; return; fi; kb=$(( $(stat -c%s "$f") / 1024 )); if [ "$kb" -gt "$2" ]; then echo "  OVER: $f = ${kb}KB (limit $2KB)"; fail=1; else echo "  OK: $f = ${kb}KB / $2KB"; fi; }; echo "Bundle-size budget (gzipped):"; check "oriel.js.gz" 5; check "oriel-core.*.js.gz" 67; exit $fail'
gates.note: Replicates validate.yml bundle-size step exactly: oriel.js.gz<=5KB, oriel-core.*.js.gz<=67KB.

gates.command: docker run -d --name demo -p 8123:8123 ghcr.io/thedave94/ha-demo-harness:v0.1.4 && HA_URL=http://localhost:8123 npm run e2e:api
gates.note: Required check, but dockerized + ghcr-dependent; intentionally promoted. Confirmed in CI, NOT part of the local-green predictor.
